summary: Tested Workshop Dashboard and 'Confronta Serramenti' comparison feature in Certificazioni wizard Step 4. Both features fully functional. Dashboard shows 4 KPIs, 3 Quick Actions, 3 widgets with proper data-testid attributes. Comparison feature allows saving multiple thermal configurations and comparing them side-by-side with best Uw highlighted by 'Migliore' badge.

backend.GET /api/dashboard/stats with auth: PASS - Returns all 8 fields: ferro_kg, distinte_attive, cantieri_attivi, pos_mese, fatturato_mese, scadenze, materiale, recent_invoices
backend.POST /api/certificazioni/thermal/calcula: PASS - Returns Uw calculation with zone compliance and warnings

frontend_comparison_feature.data-testid='btn-add-comparison': PASS - 'Salva per Confronto' button appears after Uw calculation
frontend_comparison_feature.data-testid='comparison-table': PASS - Comparison table appears after first save
frontend_comparison_feature.Multiple configs saved: PASS - Successfully saved 3 configurations with different Uw values (1.74, 1.39, 0.73)
frontend_comparison_feature.Table columns: PASS - Shows Vetro, Telaio, Canalina, Uw, Ecobonus E
frontend_comparison_feature.'Migliore' badge: PASS - Best Uw (0.73) highlighted with green 'Migliore' badge
frontend_comparison_feature.Ecobonus status: PASS - Shows 'SI' for eligible configs, 'NO' for ineligible
frontend_comparison_feature.Remove functionality: PASS - Delete button removes config from table

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All dashboard elements and comparison feature working)

test_credentials: Created test user test-user-iteration13-1772194849379 with session token, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Workshop Dashboard and Thermal Calculator comparison feature ('Confronta Serramenti') both fully tested and working. Dashboard requires auth (GET /api/dashboard/stats). Thermal endpoints are public. Comparison feature is frontend-only (no backend storage) - uses React state to store configurations. Best Uw is automatically identified and marked with 'Migliore' badge.
